name: Appetizer Wieners
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the wieners into eighths and place them on a microwave bowl or paper plate.
2. Combine the remaining ingredients in a small bowl.
3. Brush half of the mixture over the wieners.
4. With the microwave set to HIGH, cook for 1-1/2 minutes, rotating the plate one-half turn after 1 minute.
5. Brush with the remaining sauce mixture.
6. Continue cooking on HIGH for an additional 1 minute. Insert a toothpick into the top of each wiener piece.
One Serving: Calories: 43 Carbohydrates: negligible
Exchange: 1/3 high-fat meat
Note: This recipe is from the Diabetic Microwave Cookbook, published by Sterling Publishing in 1989.
